name: CLKINV_f
description: Event input block - receives clock/event signals into the diagram
xmlExample:
<EventInBlock id="..." interfaceFunctionName="CLKINV_f" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="input" simulationFunctionType="DEFAULT" style="CLKINV_f">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0"/>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="20.0" height="20.0"/>
</EventInBlock>
anomalies: Uses EventInBlock tag instead of BasicBlock
Command port has initialState=-1.0 (event port default)
exprs value '1' is stored as string in ScilabString
criticalRules: Must be paired with a corresponding event source
Command port outputs event signal (not continuous data)
geometry width=20, height=20 is fixed for event blocks
commonUses: Receiving clock signals from external sources
